title: proposal_findings
description: Schema for the LLM-output JSON payload that propose-change and critique consume — an array of proposal findings, each a candidate proposed-change. Distinct from doctor_findings (the doctor static-phase output).

author.description: Optional file-level LLM-self-declared author identifier. Consumed by the unified author-precedence chain (CLI flag > LIVESPEC_AUTHOR_LLM env > this field > 'unknown-llm') in propose-change/critique/revise.

name.description: Short proposal name; becomes the heading of the resulting `## Proposal: <name>` section in the proposed-change file.

target_spec_files.description: Project-root-relative paths this proposal touches (e.g., "SPECIFICATION/contracts.md"). This field is project-root-relative; do NOT use spec-target-relative paths here.

summary.description: One paragraph stating what changes and why.

motivation.description: The intent input that produced this proposal.

proposed_changes.description: Prose describing the changes, or a unified diff in fenced ```diff blocks, or both.
